name: Office Documents
summary: Office document mock/writer/LibreOffice automation for urisys-node.
description: Office document mock/writer/LibreOffice automation for urisys-node. A tellmesh capability pack adopted into urirun via its manifest (`urirun adopt-pack`): 5 urioffice:// routes mapped 1:1 to bindings.v2, validated, ready to project to MCP tools / A2A skills.
useCases: Address urioffice:// capabilities as URIs in a flow.
Project Office Documents operations to MCP tools / A2A skills.
Adopt the pack with one command, no code change.
requires: the tellmesh 'urioffice' pack (GitHub) for real handlers; dispatch works simulated without it
